mapper.select: SELECT * FROM aftersales WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO aftersales(user_id, order_id, order_item_id, qty, evidence, type, reason, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orderId}, #{orderItemId}, #{qty}, #{evidence}, #{type}, #{reason}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
